title: betula × dutillyi
intro: Betula × dutillyi, also known as the hybrid birch, is a cross between the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the silver birch (Betula pendula). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Betula × dutillyi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
